sources.title: Efficacy and safety of LY3298176, a novel dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist, in patients with type 2 diabetes: a randomised, placebo-controlled and active comparator-controlled phase 2 trial
sources.abstract: Phase 2 dose-ranging study demonstrating tirzepatide's glucose-lowering and weight loss effects compared to placebo and dulaglutide.

sources.title: Tirzepatide versus Semaglutide Once Weekly in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes
sources.abstract: SURPASS-2 trial: Head-to-head comparison showing tirzepatide superiority over semaglutide 1mg for HbA1c reduction and weight loss.

sources.title: Tirzepatide Once Weekly for the Treatment of Obesity
sources.abstract: SURMOUNT-1 trial: Tirzepatide achieved 22.5% weight loss in adults with obesity without diabetes.

sources.title: Tirzepatide versus insulin degludec in type 2 diabetes (SURPASS-3): a randomised, open-label, parallel-group, phase 3 trial
sources.abstract: SURPASS-3: Tirzepatide superior to insulin degludec for glycemic control with significant weight loss.

sources.title: Tirzepatide versus insulin glargine in type 2 diabetes and increased cardiovascular risk (SURPASS-4): a randomised, open-label, parallel-group, multicentre, phase 3 trial
sources.abstract: SURPASS-4: Tirzepatide demonstrated superior glycemic control vs insulin glargine in patients with high CV risk.

sources.title: Efficacy and safety of tirzepatide monotherapy versus placebo in patients with type 2 diabetes (SURPASS-1): a double-blind, randomised, phase 3 trial
sources.abstract: SURPASS-1: Tirzepatide monotherapy achieved significant HbA1c reductions vs placebo in drug-naive patients.

sources.title: Tirzepatide once weekly for the treatment of obesity in people with type 2 diabetes (SURMOUNT-2): a double-blind, randomised, multicentre, placebo-controlled, phase 3 trial
sources.abstract: SURMOUNT-2: Tirzepatide achieved 15.7% weight loss in adults with obesity and type 2 diabetes.

sources.title: Tirzepatide, a dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor co-agonist for the treatment of type 2 diabetes with unmatched effectiveness regarding glycaemic control and body weight reduction
sources.abstract: Comprehensive review of tirzepatide's dual mechanism and clinical development program.

sources.title: Tirzepatide for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis with liver fibrosis
sources.abstract: SYNERGY-NASH phase 2 data showing tirzepatide improved liver histology in MASH patients.

sources.title: LY3298176, a novel dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist for the treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus: From discovery to clinical proof of concept
sources.abstract: Discovery paper describing tirzepatide's pharmacology in rodent and primate models.

sources.title: Tirzepatide reduces appetite, energy intake, and fat mass in diet-induced obese mice and monkey models
sources.abstract: Preclinical study in mice and primates demonstrating tirzepatide's effects on appetite and body composition.

sources.title: Tirzepatide for Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction and Obesity
sources.abstract: SUMMIT trial: Tirzepatide improved heart failure outcomes in HFpEF patients with obesity.

trials.title: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Nonalcoholic Steatohepatitis (NASH) (SYNERGY-NASH)
A Study of Tirzepatide in Participants With Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction and Obesity (SUMMIT)
conditions: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction

trials.title: A Study of Tirzepatide in Participants With Obstructive Sleep Apnea and Obesity
A Study of Tirzepatide Compared With Insulin Glargine in Participants With Type 2 Diabetes
